customAttributes.description:
Please Note: This printing of Virtue of Persistence features a Top 8 stamp commemorating a Store Championship Top 8 win, and a Store Name. The Store Name on the card you will receive will be RANDOM For a non-randomized version of this Store Championship Promo, please shop Listings with Photos.

Deathtouch
Whenever this creature attacks the player with the most life or tied for most life, create a 1/1 white Vampire creature token with lifelink.
Whenever this creature attacks while you have the most life or are tied for most life, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

details.setUrlName: Game Day and Store Championship Promos
